svg.text: TIG ROTATOR · POST INDUSTRIAL UI MAP
Design tokens: theme.h COL_* | 800 x 480 landscape | layered thumbnails (grain + hdr accent + spines)

g.text: Use ASCII-only labels on device (Montserrat); accent follows runtime theme palette.
Orange spine lines = column rhythm (spec cue). Fine grain on thumbnails only. On-device UI stays flat vector per LVGL.
Runs until STOP or pedal release
Motor disabled. Clear fault before restart.
Pedal cannot start if ESTOP, ALM or RPM block is active
00:12 START CONT / 00:10 REQ STOP / 00:08 PEDAL DOWN
WP OD in KIN. MOVE 360, APPLY. Then verify MOVE + 2nd meas.
Match WP OD; MOVE 360 per KIN (set OD on Step).
Hold to run, release to stop

svg.text: CALIBRATION: layout from theme.h CAL_* (see calibration_screen_proposal.svg). OUT|WP steps/deg, CMD 360, APPLY + verify; PASS when |err| <= 0.5 deg.
